title: Marketing AI Agency
tagline: AI-powered marketing with 3 specialized agents on Cloud Run
description: Deploy an intelligent marketing platform with Onboarding, Content Creator, and Interaction Analysis agents — powered by Gemini 2.5 Flash and Google ADK.

agents.name: Onboarding Agent
agents.description: Conversational business intake agent that collects company info, products, audience, budget, and marketing goals. Includes automated legal compliance screening.
capabilities: Voice interaction via Gemini Live API
Legal compliance checking (GDPR, CAN-SPAM, TCPA, FTC)

agents.name: Content Creator Agent
agents.description: Generates platform-optimized marketing content with tone control, hashtag strategy, and automated content calendar planning across 6 platforms.
capabilities: Multi-platform content generation (Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter, Blog, Email, YouTube)
Content calendar creation with optimal posting times

agents.name: Interaction Analysis Agent
agents.description: Monitors engagement metrics, analyzes post performance, manages community responses, and provides data-driven recommendations.
capabilities: Trend research with web search grounding

components.name: Frontend
components.description: Next.js 15 web app with real-time chat UI

components.name: Backend
components.description: FastAPI server hosting Google ADK agent orchestration

components.name: AI/ML
components.description: Gemini 2.5 Flash for all agent reasoning

components.name: CI/CD
components.description: Automated build, push, and deploy pipeline

flow: Root Agent → Onboarding Agent | Content Creator Agent | Interaction Analysis Agent
